narration: That streaming service is 'just $3 a day.' Your gym is 'only $2 a day.' Sounds harmless — until you realize you don't have just one.
visual: Dark background. Giant '$3/DAY' text bounces in. Below it, a small '$1,095/year' counter ticks up to reveal the annual cost. Calendar icon in corner.

narration: Marketers cracked this decades ago — daily prices feel trivial to your brain. But $3 a day is exactly $1,095 a year. The math doesn't care how small it felt.
visual: Light background. Brain outline SVG. '$3/day' floats in as tiny text. Arrow points through brain. '$1,095/year' emerges large on the other side. Red highlight on the big number.

narration: Stack six of these together — streaming, gym, music, cloud storage, delivery pass, news app — and you're quietly at $14 a day. The individual feels tiny. The stack doesn't.
visual: Dark background. Six icons appear one at a time: TV screen, dumbbell, music note, cloud, delivery bag, newspaper. Each shows a daily cost. Running total grows at the bottom to $14/day.

narration: $14 a day is $5,110 a year. Invested at a 7% return instead, over ten years that becomes $51,000. Gone — because each charge felt like pocket change.
visual: Light background. Piggy bank receives coins. Arrow points to a bar chart that grows from $5K to $51K over 10 years. '$51,000' number springs in large at the end.

narration: Here's what's wild — 68% of people can't estimate their annual subscription costs within $500. The daily framing is working exactly as it was designed to.
visual: Dark background. Row of person silhouettes, 68% shaded in. A question mark bubble, then the real annual number '$5,110' revealed with a jolt. One shocked person silhouette.

narration: Pull up your bank statement right now. Add every recurring charge. Convert it to annual. That number is going to wake you up — share this so someone else wakes up too.
visual: Light background. Phone screen with recurring charges highlighted line by line. Total flips to annual cost. Bold CTA box at bottom. Upward arrow animation.
